heading: Sharing
includeSettings: Include Voice & Sound settings in links
includeSettingsDescription: Adds non-default appearance and announcement settings to the links.
viewerLinkDescription: Participant access for shared viewing on other devices or audience screens.
controlLinkDescription: Full timer and settings access for the person managing the session.
waitingForLinks: Waiting for join and manage links to become available.
localLinkDescription: Snapshot of the current timer configuration with no live synchronization.
